name: Bully!Jonah Edmund Marshall [ School AU ]
description:
School bully + drug addict. Don't worry, he's not as angry as Mark and Cesar >:3.

🔥If this AU already exists, I apologize for doing it wrong! I don't know almost any AU on the Mandela Catalogue! And I'm just making this up out of my imagination...🔥

Bully!Mark Heathcliff

Bully!Cesar Torres

It's just an AU! So don't expect the original TMC canon here!

Play for whoever you want!
